market_pulse: Competitive Tuesday activity shows LIV maintaining strong momentum with upcoming events, while Encore, OMNIA, and Hakkasan all pushing weekend lineups; Zouk and Tao Beach solidifying late April roster.

content_gaps.description: Competitors (Encore, OMNIA, Hakkasan, Tao) are all actively posting event countdowns and DJ announcements; LIV could leverage daily countdown stories mid-week to build anticipation.
content_gaps.suggested_action: Create 3-day countdown Instagram Stories for weekend headliners with behind-the-scenes setup content

content_gaps.description: Zouk and Hakkasan showing influencer collaboration posts; LIV could amplify brand partnerships with creator takeovers during peak event nights.
content_gaps.suggested_action: Coordinate 2-3 creator takeovers for April 27 Matroda event and BTC Kickoff Party

content_gaps.description: TikTok content from competitors shows alignment with trending music/audio; LIV reels could sync to chart-climbing tracks during event promotions.
content_gaps.suggested_action: Audit TikTok trending sounds weekly and create short event clips synced to top 5 tracks
